brokers/request_broker.nim
Line Branch Exec Source
1 ## RequestBroker
2 ## --------------------
3 ## RequestBroker represents a proactive decoupling pattern, that
4 ## allows defining request-response style interactions between modules without
5 ## need for direct dependencies in between.
6 ## Worth considering using it in a single provider, many requester scenario.
7 ##
8 ## Provides a declarative way to define an immutable value type together with a
9 ## thread-local broker that can register an asynchronous or synchronous provider,
10 ## dispatch typed requests and clear provider.
11 ##
12 ## For consideration use `sync` mode RequestBroker when you need to provide simple value(s)
13 ## where there is no long-running async operation involved.
14 ## Typically it act as a accessor for the local state of generic setting.
15 ##
16 ## `async` mode is better to be used when you request date that may involve some long IO operation
17 ## or action.
18 ##
19 ## Default vs. context aware use:
20 ## Every generated broker is a thread-local global instance. This means each RequestBroker enables decoupled
21 ## data exchange threadwise. Sometimes we use brokers inside a context - like inside a component that has many modules or subsystems.
22 ## In case you would instantiate multiple such components in a single thread, and each component must has its own provider for the same RequestBroker type,
23 ## in order to avoid provider collision, you can use context aware RequestBroker.
24 ## Context awareness is supported through the `BrokerContext` argument for `setProvider`, `request`, `clearProvider` interfaces.
25 ## Suce use requires generating a new unique `BrokerContext` value per component instance, and spread it to all modules using the brokers.
26 ## Example, store the `BrokerContext` as a field inside the top level component instance, and spread around at initialization of the subcomponents..
27 ##
28 ## Default broker context is defined as `DefaultBrokerContext` constant. But if you don't need context awareness, you can use the
29 ## interfaces without context argument.
30 ##
31 ## Usage:
32 ## Declare your desired request type inside a `RequestBroker` macro, add any number of fields.
33 ## Define the provider signature, that is enforced at compile time.
34 ##
35 ## ```nim
36 ## RequestBroker:
37 ## type TypeName = object
38 ## field1*: FieldType
39 ## field2*: AnotherFieldType
40 ##
41 ## proc signature*(): Future[Result[TypeName, string]]
42 ## ## Also possible to define signature with arbitrary input arguments.
43 ## proc signature*(arg1: ArgType, arg2: AnotherArgType): Future[Result[TypeName, string]]
44 ##
45 ## ```
46 ##
47 ## Sync mode (no `async` / `Future`) can be generated with:
48 ##
49 ## ```nim
50 ## RequestBroker(sync):
51 ## type TypeName = object
52 ## field1*: FieldType
53 ##
54 ## proc signature*(): Result[TypeName, string]
55 ## proc signature*(arg1: ArgType): Result[TypeName, string]
56 ## ```
57 ##
58 ## Note: When the request type is declared as a native type / alias / externally-defined
59 ## type (i.e. not an inline `object` / `ref object` definition), RequestBroker
60 ## will wrap it in `distinct` automatically unless you already used `distinct`.
61 ## This avoids overload ambiguity when multiple brokers share the same
62 ## underlying base type (Nim overload resolution does not consider return type).
63 ##
64 ## This means that for non-object request types you typically:
65 ## - construct values with an explicit cast/constructor, e.g. `MyType("x")`
66 ## - unwrap with a cast when needed, e.g. `string(myVal)` or `BaseType(myVal)`
67 ##
68 ## Example (native response type):
69 ## ```nim
70 ## RequestBroker(sync):
71 ## type MyCount = int # exported as: `distinct int`
72 ##
73 ## MyCount.setProvider(proc(): Result[MyCount, string] = ok(MyCount(42)))
74 ## let res = MyCount.request()
75 ## if res.isOk():
76 ## let raw = int(res.get())
77 ## ```
78 ##
79 ## Example (externally-defined type):
80 ## ```nim
81 ## type External = object
82 ## label*: string
83 ##
84 ## RequestBroker:
85 ## type MyExternal = External # exported as: `distinct External`
86 ##
87 ## MyExternal.setProvider(
88 ## proc(): Future[Result[MyExternal, string]] {.async.} =
89 ## ok(MyExternal(External(label: "hi")))
90 ## )
91 ## let res = await MyExternal.request()
92 ## if res.isOk():
93 ## let base = External(res.get())
94 ## echo base.label
95 ## ```
96 ## The 'TypeName' object defines the requestable data (but also can be seen as request for action with return value).
97 ## The 'signature' proc defines the provider(s) signature, that is enforced at compile time.
98 ## One signature can be with no arguments, another with any number of arguments - where the input arguments are
99 ## not related to the request type - but alternative inputs for the request to be processed.
100 ##
101 ## After this, you can register a provider anywhere in your code with
102 ## `TypeName.setProvider(...)`, which returns error if already having a provider.
103 ## Providers are async procs/lambdas in default mode and sync procs in sync mode.
104 ##
105 ## Providers are stored as a broker-context keyed list:
106 ## - the default provider is always stored at index 0 (reserved broker context: 0)
107 ## - additional providers can be registered under arbitrary non-zero broker contexts
108 ##
109 ## The original `setProvider(handler)` / `request(...)` APIs continue to operate
110 ## on the default provider (broker context 0) for backward compatibility.
111 ##
112 ## Requests can be made from anywhere with no direct dependency on the provider by
113 ## calling `TypeName.request()` - with arguments respecting the signature(s).
114 ## In async mode, this returns a Future[Result[TypeName, string]]. In sync mode, it returns Result[TypeName, string].
115 ##
116 ## Whenever you no want to process requests (or your object instance that provides the request goes out of scope),
117 ## you can remove it from the broker with `TypeName.clearProvider()`.
118 ##
119 ##
120 ## Example:
121 ## ```nim
122 ## RequestBroker:
123 ## type Greeting = object
124 ## text*: string
125 ##
126 ## ## Define the request and provider signature, that is enforced at compile time.
127 ## proc signature*(): Future[Result[Greeting, string]] {.async.}
128 ##
129 ## ## Also possible to define signature with arbitrary input arguments.
130 ## proc signature*(lang: string): Future[Result[Greeting, string]] {.async.}
131 ##
132 ## ...
133 ## Greeting.setProvider(
134 ## proc(): Future[Result[Greeting, string]] {.async.} =
135 ## ok(Greeting(text: "hello"))
136 ## )
137 ## let res = await Greeting.request()
138 ##
139 ##
140 ## ...
141 ## # using native type as response for a synchronous request.
142 ## RequestBroker(sync):
143 ## type NeedThatInfo = string
144 ##
145 ##...
146 ## NeedThatInfo.setProvider(
147 ## proc(): Result[NeedThatInfo, string] =
148 ## ok("this is the info you wanted")
149 ## )
150 ## let res = NeedThatInfo.request().valueOr:
151 ## echo "not ok due to: " & error
152 ## NeedThatInfo(":-(")
153 ##
154 ## echo string(res)
155 ## ```
156 ## If no `signature` proc is declared, a zero-argument form is generated
157 ## automatically, so the caller only needs to provide the type definition.
158
159 import std/[macros, strutils]
160 from std/sequtils import keepItIf
161 import chronos
162 import results
163 import ./internal/helper/broker_utils, ./broker_context
164 import ./internal/broker_debug
165
166 when compileOption("threads"):
167 import ./internal/mt_config, ./internal/mt_request_broker
168 export mt_config, mt_request_broker
169
170 when compileOption("threads") and defined(BrokerFfiApi):
171 # CBOR is the only FFI codegen strategy. The historical
172 # `-d:BrokerFfiApiNative` / `-d:BrokerFfiApiCBOR` flags were retired
173 # in favour of a single `-d:BrokerFfiApi`.
174 import ./internal/api_request_broker_cbor
175 export api_request_broker_cbor
176
177 export results, chronos, keepItIf, broker_context
178
179 proc errorFuture[T](message: string): Future[Result[T, string]] {.inline.} =
180 ## Build a future that is already completed with an error result.
181 let fut = newFuture[Result[T, string]]("request_broker.errorFuture")
182 fut.complete(err(Result[T, string], message))
183 fut
184
185 type RequestBrokerMode = enum
186 rbAsync
187 rbSync
188 rbMultiThread
189 rbApi
190
191 proc isAsyncReturnTypeValid(returnType, typeIdent: NimNode): bool =
192 ## Accept Future[Result[TypeIdent, string]] as the contract.
193 if returnType.kind != nnkBracketExpr or returnType.len != 2:
194 return false
195 if returnType[0].kind != nnkIdent or not returnType[0].eqIdent("Future"):
196 return false
197 let inner = returnType[1]
198 if inner.kind != nnkBracketExpr or inner.len != 3:
199 return false
200 if inner[0].kind != nnkIdent or not inner[0].eqIdent("Result"):
201 return false
202 if inner[1].kind != nnkIdent or not inner[1].eqIdent($typeIdent):
203 return false
204 inner[2].kind == nnkIdent and inner[2].eqIdent("string")
205
206 proc isSyncReturnTypeValid(returnType, typeIdent: NimNode): bool =
207 ## Accept Result[TypeIdent, string] as the contract.
208 if returnType.kind != nnkBracketExpr or returnType.len != 3:
209 return false
210 if returnType[0].kind != nnkIdent or not returnType[0].eqIdent("Result"):
211 return false
212 if returnType[1].kind != nnkIdent or not returnType[1].eqIdent($typeIdent):
213 return false
214 returnType[2].kind == nnkIdent and returnType[2].eqIdent("string")
215
216 proc isReturnTypeValid(returnType, typeIdent: NimNode, mode: RequestBrokerMode): bool =
217 case mode
218 of rbAsync, rbMultiThread, rbApi:
219 isAsyncReturnTypeValid(returnType, typeIdent)
220 of rbSync:
221 isSyncReturnTypeValid(returnType, typeIdent)
222
223 proc makeProcType(
224 returnType: NimNode, params: seq[NimNode], mode: RequestBrokerMode
225 ): NimNode =
226 var formal = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
227 formal.add(returnType)
228 for param in params:
229 formal.add(param)
230 case mode
231 of rbAsync, rbMultiThread, rbApi:
232 let pragmas = newTree(nnkPragma, ident("async"))
233 newTree(nnkProcTy, formal, pragmas)
234 of rbSync:
235 let raisesPragma = newTree(
236 nnkExprColonExpr, ident("raises"), newTree(nnkBracket, ident("CatchableError"))
237 )
238 let pragmas = newTree(nnkPragma, raisesPragma, ident("gcsafe"))
239 newTree(nnkProcTy, formal, pragmas)
240
241 proc parseMode(modeNode: NimNode): RequestBrokerMode =
242 ## Parses the mode selector for the 2-argument macro overload.
243 ## Supported spellings: `sync` / `async` / `mt` / `API` (case-insensitive).
244 let raw = ($modeNode).strip().toLowerAscii()
245 case raw
246 of "sync":
247 rbSync
248 of "async":
249 rbAsync
250 of "mt":
251 rbMultiThread
252 of "api":
253 rbApi
254 else:
255 error("RequestBroker mode must be `sync`, `async`, `mt` or `API`", modeNode)
256
257 proc generateRequestBroker(body: NimNode, mode: RequestBrokerMode): NimNode =
258 when defined(brokerDebug):
259 echo body.treeRepr
260 echo "RequestBroker mode: ", $mode
261 # Classify: legacy uses `proc signature*` procs (Ok type == broker type);
262 # the new proc-sugar uses lowercase verb procs paired to a Capitalized payload
263 # type by name, with the payload decoupled from the dispatch tag (option B).
264 # A body with no procs at all is legacy (zero-arg default).
265 var hasSignatureProc = false
266 var hasOtherProc = false
267 for stmt in body:
268 if stmt.kind == nnkProcDef:
269 let nm = stmt[0]
270 let nmId = (if nm.kind == nnkPostfix: nm[1] else: nm)
271 if ($nmId).startsWith("signature"):
272 hasSignatureProc = true
273 else:
274 hasOtherProc = true
275 let isSugar = hasOtherProc and not hasSignatureProc
276
277 var typeIdent: NimNode = nil
278 var objectDef: NimNode = nil
279 var payloadType: NimNode = nil
280 var zeroArgSig: NimNode = nil
281 var zeroArgProviderName: NimNode = nil
282 var argSig: NimNode = nil
283 var argParams: seq[NimNode] = @[]
284 var argProviderName: NimNode = nil
285
286 if not isSugar:
287 let parsed = parseSingleTypeDef(body, "RequestBroker", allowRefToNonObject = true)
288 typeIdent = parsed.typeIdent
289 objectDef = parsed.objectDef
290 payloadType = copyNimTree(typeIdent) # legacy: dispatch tag == payload
291
292 for stmt in body:
293 case stmt.kind
294 of nnkProcDef:
295 let procName = stmt[0]
296 let procNameIdent =
297 case procName.kind
298 of nnkIdent:
299 procName
300 of nnkPostfix:
301 procName[1]
302 else:
303 procName
304 let procNameStr = $procNameIdent
305 if not procNameStr.startsWith("signature"):
306 error("Signature proc names must start with `signature`", procName)
307 let params = stmt.params
308 if params.len == 0:
309 error("Signature must declare a return type", stmt)
310 let returnType = params[0]
311 if not isReturnTypeValid(returnType, typeIdent, mode):
312 case mode
313 of rbAsync, rbMultiThread, rbApi:
314 error(
315 "Signature must return Future[Result[`" & $typeIdent & "`, string]]", stmt
316 )
317 of rbSync:
318 error("Signature must return Result[`" & $typeIdent & "`, string]", stmt)
319 let paramCount = params.len - 1
320 if paramCount == 0:
321 if zeroArgSig != nil:
322 error("Only one zero-argument signature is allowed", stmt)
323 zeroArgSig = stmt
324 zeroArgProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderNoArgs")
325 elif paramCount >= 1:
326 if argSig != nil:
327 error("Only one argument-based signature is allowed", stmt)
328 argSig = stmt
329 argParams = @[]
330 for idx in 1 ..< params.len:
331 let paramDef = params[idx]
332 if paramDef.kind != nnkIdentDefs:
333 error(
334 "Signature parameter must be a standard identifier declaration",
335 paramDef,
336 )
337 let paramTypeNode = paramDef[paramDef.len - 2]
338 if paramTypeNode.kind == nnkEmpty:
339 error("Signature parameter must declare a type", paramDef)
340 var hasName = false
341 for i in 0 ..< paramDef.len - 2:
342 if paramDef[i].kind != nnkEmpty:
343 hasName = true
344 if not hasName:
345 error("Signature parameter must declare a name", paramDef)
346 argParams.add(copyNimTree(paramDef))
347 argProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderWithArgs")
348 of nnkTypeSection, nnkEmpty:
349 discard
350 else:
351 error("Unsupported statement inside RequestBroker definition", stmt)
352
353 if zeroArgSig.isNil() and argSig.isNil():
354 zeroArgSig = newEmptyNode()
355 zeroArgProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderNoArgs")
356 else:
357 # ---- New proc-sugar form (option B / decoupled payload) ----
358 let sg = parseRequestSugar(body, "RequestBroker", async = (mode != rbSync))
359 typeIdent = sg.typeIdent
360 objectDef = sg.objectDef
361 payloadType = sg.payloadType
362 if not sg.zeroArgProc.isNil:
363 zeroArgSig = sg.zeroArgProc
364 zeroArgProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderNoArgs")
365 if not sg.argProc.isNil:
366 argSig = sg.argProc
367 argParams = sg.argParams
368 argProviderName = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "ProviderWithArgs")
369
370 when defined(brokerDebug):
371 echo "RequestBroker generating type: ", $typeIdent
372
373 let exportedTypeIdent = postfix(copyNimTree(typeIdent), "*")
374 let typeDisplayName = sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent)
375 let typeNameLit = newLit(typeDisplayName)
376
377 var typeSection = newTree(nnkTypeSection)
378 typeSection.add(newTree(nnkTypeDef, exportedTypeIdent, newEmptyNode(), objectDef))
379
380 let returnType =
381 case mode
382 of rbAsync, rbMultiThread, rbApi:
383 quote:
384 Future[Result[`payloadType`, string]]
385 of rbSync:
386 quote:
387 Result[`payloadType`, string]
388
389 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
390 let procType = makeProcType(returnType, @[], mode)
391 typeSection.add(newTree(nnkTypeDef, zeroArgProviderName, newEmptyNode(), procType))
392 if not argSig.isNil():
393 let procType = makeProcType(returnType, cloneParams(argParams), mode)
394 typeSection.add(newTree(nnkTypeDef, argProviderName, newEmptyNode(), procType))
395
396 var brokerRecList = newTree(nnkRecList)
397 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
398 let zeroArgProvidersFieldName = ident("providersNoArgs")
399 let zeroArgProvidersTupleTy = newTree(
400 nnkTupleTy,
401 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("brokerCtx"), ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode()),
402 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("handler"), zeroArgProviderName, newEmptyNode()),
403 )
404 let zeroArgProvidersSeqTy =
405 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("seq"), zeroArgProvidersTupleTy)
406 brokerRecList.add(
407 newTree(
408 nnkIdentDefs, zeroArgProvidersFieldName, zeroArgProvidersSeqTy, newEmptyNode()
409 )
410 )
411 if not argSig.isNil():
412 let argProvidersFieldName = ident("providersWithArgs")
413 let argProvidersTupleTy = newTree(
414 nnkTupleTy,
415 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("brokerCtx"), ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode()),
416 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("handler"), argProviderName, newEmptyNode()),
417 )
418 let argProvidersSeqTy = newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("seq"), argProvidersTupleTy)
419 brokerRecList.add(
420 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, argProvidersFieldName, argProvidersSeqTy, newEmptyNode())
421 )
422 let brokerTypeIdent = ident(sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "Broker")
423 let brokerTypeDef = newTree(
424 nnkTypeDef,
425 brokerTypeIdent,
426 newEmptyNode(),
427 newTree(nnkObjectTy, newEmptyNode(), newEmptyNode(), brokerRecList),
428 )
429 typeSection.add(brokerTypeDef)
430 result = newStmtList()
431 result.add(typeSection)
432
433 let globalVarIdent = ident("g" & sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "Broker")
434 let accessProcIdent = ident("access" & sanitizeIdentName(typeIdent) & "Broker")
435
436 var brokerNewBody = newStmtList()
437 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
438 brokerNewBody.add(
439 quote do:
440 result.providersNoArgs =
441 @[(brokerCtx: DefaultBrokerContext, handler: default(`zeroArgProviderName`))]
442 )
443 if not argSig.isNil():
444 brokerNewBody.add(
445 quote do:
446 result.providersWithArgs =
447 @[(brokerCtx: DefaultBrokerContext, handler: default(`argProviderName`))]
448 )
449
450 var brokerInitChecks = newStmtList()
451 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
452 brokerInitChecks.add(
453 quote do:
454 if `globalVarIdent`.providersNoArgs.len == 0:
455 `globalVarIdent` = `brokerTypeIdent`.new()
456 )
457 if not argSig.isNil():
458 brokerInitChecks.add(
459 quote do:
460 if `globalVarIdent`.providersWithArgs.len == 0:
461 `globalVarIdent` = `brokerTypeIdent`.new()
462 )
463
464 result.add(
465 quote do:
466 var `globalVarIdent` {.threadvar.}: `brokerTypeIdent`
467
468 proc new(_: type `brokerTypeIdent`): `brokerTypeIdent` =
469 result = `brokerTypeIdent`()
470 `brokerNewBody`
471
472 proc `accessProcIdent`(): var `brokerTypeIdent` =
473 `brokerInitChecks`
474 `globalVarIdent`
475
476 )
477
478 var clearBodyKeyed = newStmtList()
479 let brokerCtxParamIdent = ident("brokerCtx")
480 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
481 let zeroArgProvidersFieldName = ident("providersNoArgs")
482 result.add(
483 quote do:
484 proc setProvider*(
485 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`], handler: `zeroArgProviderName`
486 ): Result[void, string] =
487 if not `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`[0].handler.isNil():
488 return err("Zero-arg provider already set")
489 `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`[0].handler = handler
490 return ok()
491
492 )
493
494 result.add(
495 quote do:
496 proc setProvider*(
497 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`],
498 brokerCtx: BrokerContext,
499 handler: `zeroArgProviderName`,
500 ): Result[void, string] =
501 if brokerCtx == DefaultBrokerContext:
502 return setProvider(`typeIdent`, handler)
503
504 for entry in `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`:
505 if entry.brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
506 return err(
507 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
508 "): provider already set for broker context " & $brokerCtx
509 )
510
511 `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`.add(
512 (brokerCtx: brokerCtx, handler: handler)
513 )
514 return ok()
515
516 )
517 clearBodyKeyed.add(
518 quote do:
519 if `brokerCtxParamIdent` == DefaultBrokerContext:
520 `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`[0].handler =
521 default(`zeroArgProviderName`)
522 else:
523 `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`.keepItIf(
524 it.brokerCtx != `brokerCtxParamIdent`
525 )
526 )
527 case mode
528 of rbAsync, rbMultiThread, rbApi:
529 result.add(
530 quote do:
531 proc request*(
532 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`]
533 ): Future[Result[`payloadType`, string]] {.async: (raises: []).} =
534 return await request(`typeIdent`, DefaultBrokerContext)
535
536 )
537
538 result.add(
539 quote do:
540 proc request*(
541 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`], brokerCtx: BrokerContext
542 ): Future[Result[`payloadType`, string]] {.async: (raises: []).} =
543 var provider: `zeroArgProviderName`
544 if brokerCtx == DefaultBrokerContext:
545 provider = `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`[0].handler
546 else:
547 for entry in `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`:
548 if entry.brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
549 provider = entry.handler
550 break
551
552 if provider.isNil():
553 if brokerCtx == DefaultBrokerContext:
554 return err(
555 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): no zero-arg provider registered"
556 )
557 return err(
558 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
559 "): no provider registered for broker context " & $brokerCtx
560 )
561
562 let catchedRes = catch:
563 await provider()
564
565 if catchedRes.isErr():
566 return err(
567 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
568 catchedRes.error.msg
569 )
570
571 let providerRes = catchedRes.get()
572 if providerRes.isOk():
573 when compiles(providerRes.get().isNil()) and
574 not (typeof(providerRes.get()) is string):
575 if providerRes.get().isNil():
576 return err(
577 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider returned nil result"
578 )
579 return providerRes
580
581 )
582 of rbSync:
583 # Keyed variant first — the forwarder below calls it, and `sync` bodies
584 # are sem-checked eagerly (no forward references for overloaded routines).
585 result.add(
586 quote do:
587 proc request*(
588 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`], brokerCtx: BrokerContext
589 ): Result[`payloadType`, string] {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
590 var provider: `zeroArgProviderName`
591 if brokerCtx == DefaultBrokerContext:
592 provider = `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`[0].handler
593 else:
594 for entry in `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`:
595 if entry.brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
596 provider = entry.handler
597 break
598
599 if provider.isNil():
600 if brokerCtx == DefaultBrokerContext:
601 return err(
602 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): no zero-arg provider registered"
603 )
604 return err(
605 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
606 "): no provider registered for broker context " & $brokerCtx
607 )
608
609 var providerRes: Result[`payloadType`, string]
610 try:
611 providerRes = provider()
612 except CatchableError as e:
613 return err(
614 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
615 e.msg
616 )
617
618 if providerRes.isOk():
619 when compiles(providerRes.get().isNil()) and
620 not (typeof(providerRes.get()) is string):
621 if providerRes.get().isNil():
622 return err(
623 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider returned nil result"
624 )
625 return providerRes
626
627 )
628
629 result.add(
630 quote do:
631 proc request*(
632 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`]
633 ): Result[`payloadType`, string] {.gcsafe, raises: [].} =
634 return request(`typeIdent`, DefaultBrokerContext)
635
636 )
637 if not argSig.isNil():
638 let argProvidersFieldName = ident("providersWithArgs")
639 result.add(
640 quote do:
641 proc setProvider*(
642 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`], handler: `argProviderName`
643 ): Result[void, string] =
644 if not `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`[0].handler.isNil():
645 return err("Provider already set")
646 `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`[0].handler = handler
647 return ok()
648
649 )
650
651 result.add(
652 quote do:
653 proc setProvider*(
654 _: typedesc[`typeIdent`],
655 brokerCtx: BrokerContext,
656 handler: `argProviderName`,
657 ): Result[void, string] =
658 if brokerCtx == DefaultBrokerContext:
659 return setProvider(`typeIdent`, handler)
660
661 for entry in `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`:
662 if entry.brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
663 return err(
664 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
665 "): provider already set for broker context " & $brokerCtx
666 )
667
668 `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`.add(
669 (brokerCtx: brokerCtx, handler: handler)
670 )
671 return ok()
672
673 )
674 clearBodyKeyed.add(
675 quote do:
676 if `brokerCtxParamIdent` == DefaultBrokerContext:
677 `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`[0].handler =
678 default(`argProviderName`)
679 else:
680 `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`.keepItIf(
681 it.brokerCtx != `brokerCtxParamIdent`
682 )
683 )
684 let requestParamDefs = cloneParams(argParams)
685 let argNameIdents = collectParamNames(requestParamDefs)
686 var formalParams = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
687 formalParams.add(copyNimTree(returnType))
688 formalParams.add(
689 newTree(
690 nnkIdentDefs,
691 ident("_"),
692 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("typedesc"), copyNimTree(typeIdent)),
693 newEmptyNode(),
694 )
695 )
696 for paramDef in requestParamDefs:
697 formalParams.add(paramDef)
698
699 let requestPragmas =
700 case mode
701 of rbAsync, rbMultiThread, rbApi:
702 quote:
703 {.async: (raises: []).}
704 of rbSync:
705 quote:
706 {.gcsafe, raises: [].}
707
708 var forwardCall = newCall(ident("request"))
709 forwardCall.add(copyNimTree(typeIdent))
710 forwardCall.add(ident("DefaultBrokerContext"))
711 for argName in argNameIdents:
712 forwardCall.add(argName)
713
714 var requestBody = newStmtList()
715 case mode
716 of rbAsync, rbMultiThread, rbApi:
717 requestBody.add(
718 quote do:
719 return await `forwardCall`
720 )
721 of rbSync:
722 requestBody.add(
723 quote do:
724 return `forwardCall`
725 )
726
727 # Built now, but added to `result` only *after* the keyed variant below:
728 # the forwarder's body calls the keyed `request`, and in `sync` mode the
729 # body is sem-checked eagerly, so the keyed overload must already be
730 # declared (Nim has no forward references for overloaded routines). Async
731 # tolerates either order because the `async` macro reprocesses the body
732 # after the surrounding scope is fully populated.
733 let nonKeyedRequestProc = newTree(
734 nnkProcDef,
735 postfix(ident("request"), "*"),
736 newEmptyNode(),
737 newEmptyNode(),
738 formalParams,
739 requestPragmas,
740 newEmptyNode(),
741 requestBody,
742 )
743
744 # Keyed request variant for the argument-based signature.
745 let requestParamDefsKeyed = cloneParams(argParams)
746 let argNameIdentsKeyed = collectParamNames(requestParamDefsKeyed)
747 21 let providerSymKeyed = genSym(nskVar, "provider")
748 var formalParamsKeyed = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
749 formalParamsKeyed.add(copyNimTree(returnType))
750 formalParamsKeyed.add(
751 newTree(
752 nnkIdentDefs,
753 ident("_"),
754 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("typedesc"), copyNimTree(typeIdent)),
755 newEmptyNode(),
756 )
757 )
758 formalParamsKeyed.add(
759 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, ident("brokerCtx"), ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode())
760 )
761 for paramDef in requestParamDefsKeyed:
762 formalParamsKeyed.add(paramDef)
763
764 let requestPragmasKeyed = requestPragmas
765 var providerCallKeyed = newCall(providerSymKeyed)
766 for argName in argNameIdentsKeyed:
767 providerCallKeyed.add(argName)
768
769 var requestBodyKeyed = newStmtList()
770 requestBodyKeyed.add(
771 quote do:
772 var `providerSymKeyed`: `argProviderName`
773 if brokerCtx == DefaultBrokerContext:
774 `providerSymKeyed` = `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`[0].handler
775 else:
776 for entry in `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`:
777 if entry.brokerCtx == brokerCtx:
778 `providerSymKeyed` = entry.handler
779 break
780 )
781 requestBodyKeyed.add(
782 quote do:
783 if `providerSymKeyed`.isNil():
784 if brokerCtx == DefaultBrokerContext:
785 return err(
786 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
787 "): no provider registered for input signature"
788 )
789 return err(
790 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` &
791 "): no provider registered for broker context " & $brokerCtx
792 )
793 )
794
795 case mode
796 of rbAsync, rbMultiThread, rbApi:
797 requestBodyKeyed.add(
798 quote do:
799 let catchedRes = catch:
800 await `providerCallKeyed`
801 if catchedRes.isErr():
802 return err(
803 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " &
804 catchedRes.error.msg
805 )
806
807 let providerRes = catchedRes.get()
808 if providerRes.isOk():
809 when compiles(providerRes.get().isNil()) and
810 not (typeof(providerRes.get()) is string):
811 if providerRes.get().isNil():
812 return err(
813 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider returned nil result"
814 )
815 return providerRes
816 )
817 of rbSync:
818 requestBodyKeyed.add(
819 quote do:
820 var providerRes: Result[`payloadType`, string]
821 try:
822 providerRes = `providerCallKeyed`
823 except CatchableError as e:
824 return err(
825 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider threw exception: " & e.msg
826 )
827
828 if providerRes.isOk():
829 when compiles(providerRes.get().isNil()) and
830 not (typeof(providerRes.get()) is string):
831 if providerRes.get().isNil():
832 return err(
833 "RequestBroker(" & `typeNameLit` & "): provider returned nil result"
834 )
835 return providerRes
836 )
837
838 result.add(
839 newTree(
840 nnkProcDef,
841 postfix(ident("request"), "*"),
842 newEmptyNode(),
843 newEmptyNode(),
844 formalParamsKeyed,
845 requestPragmasKeyed,
846 newEmptyNode(),
847 requestBodyKeyed,
848 )
849 )
850
851 # Now the keyed overload is in scope for the forwarder's body.
852 result.add(nonKeyedRequestProc)
853
854 block:
855 var formalParamsClearKeyed = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
856 formalParamsClearKeyed.add(newEmptyNode())
857 formalParamsClearKeyed.add(
858 newTree(
859 nnkIdentDefs,
860 ident("_"),
861 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("typedesc"), copyNimTree(typeIdent)),
862 newEmptyNode(),
863 )
864 )
865 formalParamsClearKeyed.add(
866 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, brokerCtxParamIdent, ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode())
867 )
868
869 result.add(
870 newTree(
871 nnkProcDef,
872 postfix(ident("clearProvider"), "*"),
873 newEmptyNode(),
874 newEmptyNode(),
875 formalParamsClearKeyed,
876 newEmptyNode(),
877 newEmptyNode(),
878 clearBodyKeyed,
879 )
880 )
881
882 result.add(
883 quote do:
884 proc clearProvider*(_: typedesc[`typeIdent`]) =
885 clearProvider(`typeIdent`, DefaultBrokerContext)
886
887 )
888
889 # ── isProvided ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
890 # Returns true when at least one provider slot (zero-arg or with-arg)
891 # is filled for the given broker context.
892 block:
893 var isProvidedBody = newStmtList()
894 if not zeroArgSig.isNil():
895 let zeroArgProvidersFieldName = ident("providersNoArgs")
896 isProvidedBody.add(
897 quote do:
898 if `brokerCtxParamIdent` == DefaultBrokerContext:
899 if not `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`[0].handler.isNil():
900 return true
901 else:
902 for entry in `accessProcIdent`().`zeroArgProvidersFieldName`:
903 if entry.brokerCtx == `brokerCtxParamIdent` and not entry.handler.isNil():
904 return true
905 )
906 if not argSig.isNil():
907 let argProvidersFieldName = ident("providersWithArgs")
908 isProvidedBody.add(
909 quote do:
910 if `brokerCtxParamIdent` == DefaultBrokerContext:
911 if not `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`[0].handler.isNil():
912 return true
913 else:
914 for entry in `accessProcIdent`().`argProvidersFieldName`:
915 if entry.brokerCtx == `brokerCtxParamIdent` and not entry.handler.isNil():
916 return true
917 )
918 isProvidedBody.add(
919 quote do:
920 return false
921 )
922
923 var formalParamsIsProvided = newTree(nnkFormalParams)
924 formalParamsIsProvided.add(ident("bool"))
925 formalParamsIsProvided.add(
926 newTree(
927 nnkIdentDefs,
928 ident("_"),
929 newTree(nnkBracketExpr, ident("typedesc"), copyNimTree(typeIdent)),
930 newEmptyNode(),
931 )
932 )
933 formalParamsIsProvided.add(
934 newTree(nnkIdentDefs, brokerCtxParamIdent, ident("BrokerContext"), newEmptyNode())
935 )
936
937 result.add(
938 newTree(
939 nnkProcDef,
940 postfix(ident("isProvided"), "*"),
941 newEmptyNode(),
942 newEmptyNode(),
943 formalParamsIsProvided,
944 newEmptyNode(),
945 newEmptyNode(),
946 isProvidedBody,
947 )
948 )
949

1018 of rbApi:
1019 when not compileOption("threads"):
1020 {.
1021 error:
1022 "RequestBroker(API) requires --threads:on. " &
1023 "Compile with `--threads:on` to use API RequestBroker."
1024 .}
1025 else:
1026 when defined(BrokerFfiApi):
1027 # Validate kwargs at the outer macro for clear error origin,
1028 # then hand them to the deferred codegen which re-parses into
1029 # MtReqCfg. RequestBroker(API) runs on the same MT lane
1030 # underneath, so it accepts the same capacity knobs as
1031 # RequestBroker(mt) (queueDepth / slabCapacity /
1032 # maxPayloadBytes / responseSlots / maxResponseBytes /
1033 # freeListShards / preset).
1034 discard parseMtReqKwargs(split.kwargs)
1035 generateApiCborRequestBroker(body, split.kwargs)
1036 else:
1037 let cfg = parseMtReqKwargs(split.kwargs)
1038 generateMtRequestBroker(body, cfg)

1043 split.kwargs[0],
1044 )
1045 generateRequestBroker(body, m)
